hero.description: Building a strong and supportive future for our community. Discover the backing of an institution that values your effort.

values.solidarityText: The fundamental pillar that unites us to overcome challenges and achieve collective goals that benefit everyone.
values.productionText: We foster the economic development of our members through strategic financial tools.
values.educationText: Continuous training to empower our community with financial and technical knowledge.

about.label: About Us
about.title: The Architectural Sanctuary of Your Finances
about.description1: At Ysateños, we understand that financial stability is the foundation of family peace of mind. We are not just a cooperative; we are a community committed to mutual growth.
about.description2: Our mission is to provide comprehensive financial solutions under the principle of solidarity, ensuring that every member has the necessary support for their life projects, from education to homeownership.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Designed to cover every stage of your life with the security you deserve.
services.savingsText: Scheduled savings plans with the most competitive rates in the cooperative market.
services.creditText: Flexible financing adapted to your personal or business needs.
services.sportsText: Physical and social well-being for the whole family through our sports schools.

trustBanner.title: Ready to join our family?
trustBanner.subtitle: Become a member today and start enjoying all the exclusive benefits.

footer.description: Committed to the comprehensive development of members and their community through mutual aid.
footer.address: Avda. La Victoria c/ Avda. Fernando de la Mora, Barrio San Pablo, Asunción - Paraguay
